name: Green Beans in Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the green beans in a little water until tender, and partially drain.
2. To prepare the mustard sauce, grind together mustard seed, rosemary (or rue), and cumin.
3. Add honey, finely chopped nuts, vinegar, and stock to the ground mixture.
4. Heat the sauce.
5. Pour the heated sauce into the pan of cooked green beans.
6. Stir and simmer for a few minutes.
7. Serve with butter and a sprinkling of pepper.
